---
type: React Component
title: Post Link.Generated
description: PostLink is a shared UI component in the marketing web app template, rendering a navigable link to an individual blog or content post. It's used wherever post references need to surface as clickable entries — for example in listing pages, related-content sections, or navigation elements that point users toward a specific post.
level: component
icon: fe-component.svg
owner: contentful/team-workflows
ddd_subdomain: supporting
ddd_context: Layout & Navigation
ddd_role: Generated Data Component
---

As a generated shared-ui piece, it's meant to be reused consistently across the app rather than reimplemented per page, keeping the visual and navigational treatment of post links uniform throughout the marketing site.
